vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng thị giác ngoạn mục
vocab.example: The fireworks over the Sydney Opera House created a visual spectacle that I will cherish forever.

vocab.meaning: kỳ quan về mặt địa hình
vocab.example: Gazing down into the Grand Canyon, I realized it was a topographical marvel far beyond what any photograph could capture.

vocab.meaning: vòm lá xanh tươi rậm rạp
vocab.example: From the observation deck, all I could see was a lush, verdant canopy stretching to the edge of the horizon.

vocab.meaning: sức lôi cuốn đầy mê hoặc/thu hút ánh nhìn ngay lập tức
vocab.example: The desert at twilight has an arresting allure, with the shifting sands turning deep shades of violet and crimson.

vocab.meaning: sự tiếp giáp/tương phản rõ rệt
vocab.example: The stark juxtaposition of the ancient ruins against the backdrop of a modern, neon-lit city was truly unforgettable.

vocab.meaning: thu trọn tầm mắt một khung cảnh (từ trên cao)
vocab.example: The hotel suite was situated on the top floor, allowing it to command a view of the entire bay.
I was fascinated by the bizarre geological formations of the stone forest, which looked like something from another planet.

vocab.meaning: địa hình nhấp nhô lượn sóng
vocab.example: We hiked across the undulating terrain of the Scottish Highlands, where every turn revealed a more beautiful glen than the last.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ đồ sộ (của những khối đá/công trình lớn)
vocab.example: The monolithic grandeur of Uluru at sunset is a sight that evokes a deep sense of spirituality.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn trực diện/không bị che chắn
vocab.example: Reaching the summit provided an unmediated vista of the valley below, free from any signs of human habitation.
